rag_rules: Place component type contracts in component type scopes; use implementation scopes for subcomponent bindings.
Use visible identifiers from the AADL model for AGREE expressions and declarations.
generic_rules: Assumptions and guarantees should reference valid AADL features and types.
AGREE contracts must use valid logical operators and expression syntax.
Constants and equations in AGREE should match the declared scalar types (int, real, bool).
Avoid referencing implementation-only elements in component type annexes.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annex blocks are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};`.
Equations are declared using `eq name : type = expression;`.
anti_patterns: Do not reference undefined or non-visible identifiers in AGREE contracts.
Do not mix implementation-level subcomponent paths in component type contracts.
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations as AGREE variables
Model fusion and architecture grounding specifics
